author: doll-agent
content: [action] Fixed RandomForest per-split feature sampling bug. Was per-tree fixed subset (Bagging-style). Now matches Breiman 2001/sklearn. Real impact at medium_10Kx100: +14.85pp accuracy (78.20% -> 93.05%, sklearn 94.25%). At small/tiny ferrolearn now BEATS sklearn (+1.5pp, +10pp). Saved reports/post_rf_fix.{json,md}.
